_comment: Critical-tier employees only. Each entry has a path to the agent persona file and a tagline used for routing during grill sessions. Add an employee here only when you need to delegate work to them.

ai-engineer.tagline: Designs and implements AI/ML features, prompt pipelines, and model integrations

backend-architect.tagline: Designs APIs, data models, service boundaries, and system architecture

software-architect.tagline: Defines technical direction, evaluates trade-offs, and governs code quality

senior-developer.tagline: Implements features and fixes bugs across the full backend stack

code-reviewer.tagline: Reviews PRs for correctness, security, performance, and style

frontend-developer.tagline: Builds UI components, state management, and client-side integrations

security-engineer.tagline: Audits for vulnerabilities, hardens infrastructure, and enforces secure patterns

devops-automator.tagline: Automates CI/CD, infrastructure provisioning, and deployment pipelines

data-engineer.tagline: Designs and builds data pipelines, warehouses, and ETL workflows

sre.tagline: Maintains reliability, defines SLOs, and manages incident response

incident-response-commander.tagline: Leads active incident triage, coordinates resolution, and writes postmortems

rapid-prototyper.tagline: Builds throwaway proof-of-concepts to validate ideas before committing

minimal-change-engineer.tagline: Makes the smallest safe change to fix a bug without side effects

mobile-app-builder.tagline: Builds and ships iOS/Android features using React Native or native SDKs

technical-writer.tagline: Writes ADRs, READMEs, API docs, and internal documentation

threat-detection-engineer.tagline: Detects security threats, monitors alerts, and writes detection rules

database-optimizer.tagline: Tunes queries, designs indexes, and improves database performance

ai-data-remediation-engineer.tagline: Cleans, validates, and transforms AI training and inference datasets

autonomous-optimization-architect.tagline: Designs self-improving systems and feedback loops for AI agents

codebase-onboarding-engineer.tagline: Maps an unfamiliar codebase and produces orientation guides

git-workflow-master.tagline: Manages branches, resolves conflicts, and enforces git hygiene

reality-checker.tagline: Challenges assumptions by testing claims against evidence and codebase reality

api-tester.tagline: Writes and runs API test suites, validates contracts, and catches regressions

performance-benchmarker.tagline: Measures and profiles system performance, identifies bottlenecks

workflow-optimizer.tagline: Audits and improves agent and human workflows for speed and reliability

accessibility-auditor.tagline: Audits UI for WCAG compliance and surfaces inclusive design gaps

test-results-analyzer.tagline: Interprets test output, identifies failure patterns, recommends fixes

tool-evaluator.tagline: Evaluates and compares tools, libraries, and vendors against requirements

evidence-collector.tagline: Gathers and organises evidence to support decisions or investigations

nexus-strategy.tagline: Develops high-level strategic plans across business, product, and technology

agents-orchestrator.tagline: Coordinates multiple AI agents for complex multi-step workflows

chief-of-staff.tagline: Manages the AWI vault, classifies inputs, and files structured data

workflow-architect.tagline: Designs agent-driven workflows, state machines, and automation pipelines

automation-governance-architect.tagline: Defines rules and guardrails for autonomous agent behaviour

agentic-identity-trust.tagline: Designs identity, auth, and trust models for AI agent systems
